title: Grid-Based Sorting
learningObjectives: Explain why reshaping 3DGS attributes into a sorted 2D grid improves compressibility, using the PNG/JPEG analogy.
Formalize sorting as a dimensionality-reduction problem and define the D<sub>p</sub> path metric and sorting quality score.
Compare Global Distance Fidelity, Grid Adjacency Fidelity, and DPQ as quality criteria for grid-based layouts.
Trace the algorithm family from SOM through SSM, LAS, and FLAS, identifying the bottleneck fixed at each step.
Describe FLAS's filter-based smoothing and local linear assignment approach and its scalability advantage.

readings.title: Why Sort Gaussians into a 2D Grid?
Sorting Quality Metrics: D<sub>p</sub>, GAF, GDF, and DPQ
Algorithm Family: SOM → SSM → LAS → FLAS

lab.title: Implementing SOM and FLAS for Grid Sorting
